items.back: Provided only if pilot requests. Given for each mile on final. Phraseology: 'RECOMMENDED ALTITUDES WILL BE PROVIDED FOR EACH MILE ON FINAL TO MINIMUM DESCENT ALTITUDE/CIRCLING MINIMUM DESCENT ALTITUDE.'

items.front: Visual reference report in surveillance approach (5-11-2)
items.back: Aircraft may be requested to report runway, approach/runway lights, or airport in sight. Helicopters/powered-lift 'point-in-space': report when able to proceed visually to landing area via prescribed surface route.

items.front: Before final descent in surveillance approach (5-11-3)
items.back: Issue: (a) advance notice of where descent will begin - 'PREPARE TO DESCEND IN (number) MILE(S)'. (b) straight-in MDA: 'MINIMUM DESCENT ALTITUDE (altitude)'. For circle to land: request aircraft approach category, issue applicable circling MDA.

At descent point: if no restriction, '(Number) MILES FROM RUNWAY/AIRPORT/HELIPORT. DESCEND TO YOUR MINIMUM DESCENT ALTITUDE.' If restriction exists: specify restriction altitude, then after limiting point: 'DESCEND TO YOUR MINIMUM DESCENT ALTITUDE.'

Transmissions every ~15 seconds. Issue: course guidance (HEADING), on-course notification, deviation info (SLIGHTLY/WELL LEFT/RIGHT OF COURSE). Trend info with RAPIDLY/SLOWLY modifiers. Distance from runway/airport/MAP each mile. Recommended altitudes if requested.

MUST discontinue when: (1) pilot requests, (2) safe approach to MAP questionable, (3) over MAP. MAY discontinue when pilot reports runway/approach lights in sight. If lights seen: advise position, PROCEED VISUALLY. If lights NOT seen: advise position, EXECUTE MISSED APPROACH.
